description.en: Unwrap WEGLD tokens to native eGold (EGLD). Convert wrapped EGLD back to native EGLD for direct use on the eGold network.
description.de: Entwrappe WEGLD Token zu nativem eGold (EGLD). Konvertiere gewraptes EGLD zurück zu nativem EGLD für die direkte Verwendung im eGold-Netzwerk.
description.es: Unwrap WEGLD tokens to native eGold (EGLD). Convert wrapped EGLD back to native EGLD for direct use on the eGold network.
description.fr: Unwrap WEGLD tokens to native eGold (EGLD). Convert wrapped EGLD back to native EGLD for direct use on the eGold network.
description.ro: Unwrap WEGLD tokens to native eGold (EGLD). Convert wrapped EGLD back to native EGLD for direct use on the eGold network.
description.it: Unwrap WEGLD tokens to native eGold (EGLD). Convert wrapped EGLD back to native EGLD for direct use on the eGold network.

description.en: Amount of WEGLD tokens to unwrap to EGLD.
description.de: Betrag an WEGLD Token zum Entwrappen zu EGLD.

description.fr: Amount of WEGLD tokens to unwrap to EGLD.
